creator: jlduran@FreeBSD.org
text:
Warn users of this port that it has been EoLd upstream, and should use an alternative, most likely Kea.

https://www.isc.org/blogs/isc-dhcp-eol/
https://www.isc.org/dhcp_migration/

I'll try to come up with a succinct message, but I'd like to know the community/maintainer's opinion first.
